events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes rebar placement on a residential job where the observed field condition is "wrong bar size vs. schedule (deformation count/size - ID+DOC)." The work has been tested/inspected. The reference materials are ACI 318, ACI 117, and placing drawings.

Wrong bar size versus the schedule is a non-compliance issue. The rebar placed doesn't match the specified bar size on the placing drawings. This is a structural concern since rebar size directly affects the structural capacity of the concrete element.

Decision: fail - because the work is non-compliant (wrong bar size vs schedule).
Risk: high - wrong bar size can significantly affect structural capacity.
Work_stage: tested/inspected
Component_conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant
Percent_complete: maybe 90% since it's been inspected but needs rework.
Value: 0 (no specific numeric reading requested beyond the defect description)
Confidence: high, 0.9
Findings: wrong bar size installed versus placing drawings schedule.
Actions: remove and replace with correct bar size per schedule; re-inspect.
Rationale: bar size mismatch is a structural non-compliance per ACI 318 and placing drawings.
References: ACI 318, ACI 117, placing drawings.
